screens.title: DEFAULT_WELCOME_SCREEN_TEMPLATE
screens.description: Template for Home Default Welcome Screen

config.helper: Avatar height

config.helper: Avatar width

config.helper: This control is hidden until this expression is true

config.helper: Order in which a user will move focus from one control to another by pressing the Tab key

config.content:
<span style="color: #596785; font-family: Open Sans; font-size: 30.497px; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; line-height: 60.922px; /* 199.765% */ letter-spacing: -0.61px;">
Welcome Back {{ _user.fullname }} </span
